name: velura
description: Velura commerce monorepo with admin backend, shared database schema, and static admin UI

scripts.check: npm run check:js && npm run build
scripts.test:api: node --test tests/api/account-service.test.js tests/api/account-router.test.js tests/api/product-service.test.js tests/api/product-router.test.js tests/api/order-service.test.js tests/api/order-router.test.js tests/api/review-service.test.js tests/api/return-service.test.js tests/api/pricing-service.test.js tests/api/security.test.js tests/api/frontend-auth-security.test.js tests/api/chatbot-recovery.test.js tests/api/chatbot-service.test.js tests/api/recommendation-service.test.js tests/api/quiz.test.js
